body:
Dear Mr. Jefferson,

This letter confirms that a settlement check in the amount of $2,800.00 has been mailed on September 22, 2026 for claim ABP-2026-0847.

Vehicle: 2019 Honda Civic
Insured/Claimant: Thomas Chen
Claim Number: ABP-2026-0847

The deductible of $500 has already been collected from the policyholder. Please allow 3-5 business days for delivery.

If you have any questions regarding this settlement, please contact your claims adjuster, Janet Rivera, at 1-800-255-7828 ext 4492.

Sincerely,
Allstate Claims Processing
Allstate Insurance Company

subject: RE: Desi Vibes Oct 17 Appearance
snippet: Hi Hari!  Yes, I'd love to be on the Diwali episode October 17th. I can talk about the Diwa...
body:
Hi Hari!

Yes, I'd love to be on the Diwali episode October 17th. I can talk about the Diwali traditions segment we discussed and share some info about the community events happening around Edison this year.

I'll send over my bio and a headshot by Wednesday. Do you want me there by 10 for sound check or is 11 okay?

Looking forward to it!
Neela

subject: Saturday Show - Happy to Join
snippet: Hari bhai!  Count me in for the Oct 17 Diwali show. I was thinking I could do a segment on ...
body:
Hari bhai!

Count me in for the Oct 17 Diwali show. I was thinking I could do a segment on easy Diwali home cooking tips, maybe 10-15 minutes? I'll bring some samples for the crew too.

Also wanted to chat about maybe doing a monthly food segment. Let me know if that's something you'd be interested in.

Cheers,
Arjun

subject: Re: WDVI Ad Spot Oct 17
snippet: Hi Hari,  Thanks for reaching out about the Diwali episode ad spot. We're definitely inter...
body:
Hi Hari,

Thanks for reaching out about the Diwali episode ad spot. We're definitely interested. Can you send me the rate card for both 30-second and 60-second spots? We might want to do both October and November.

Also, is there any opportunity for a live mention during the show? We have our annual Diwali sale starting Oct 15.

Best,
Deepak Patel
Patel's Jewelers
Oak Tree Road, Edison

subject: Diwali Episode Sponsorship
snippet: Dear Hari,  Edison Savings Bank is pleased to confirm our 60-second sponsorship spot on th...
body:
Dear Hari,

Edison Savings Bank is pleased to confirm our 60-second sponsorship spot on the Desi Vibes Diwali episode airing October 17th.

I've attached our ad copy draft for your review. We'd appreciate any feedback by Wednesday so we can finalize the recording.

This will fall under our annual sponsorship agreement. Looking forward to another great episode!

Best regards,
Michael Williams
Community Relations Manager
Edison Savings Bank

subject: Catering for the BBQ
snippet: Hi beta,  Confirming Rajan's Curry House will handle the catering for your Customer Apprec...
body:
Hi beta,

Confirming Rajan's Curry House will handle the catering for your Customer Appreciation BBQ. Here's what we're planning:

- Samosas (veggie and chicken, 200 pieces)
- Chicken Tikka skewers (100 pieces)
- Biryani (vegetable and chicken, 2 large trays each)
- Raita and chutneys
- Mango lassi (5 gallons)

The deposit is $650.00. You can send it to the restaurant account or drop a check off when you come for Sunday dinner.

Love,
Mom
